---
title: "Technology"
---

## Technology Stack

StatPan leverages modern open-source technologies to build reliable,
scalable data tools.

### Core Technologies

| Technology | Purpose |
|---|---|
| Python | Backend services, data processing, AI/ML |
| TypeScript | Web applications, developer tooling |
| Quarto | Documentation and website |
| MCP | Model Context Protocol for AI integration |

### Infrastructure

- **GitHub Actions** — CI/CD pipelines
- **GitHub Pages** — Static site hosting
- **Docker** — Containerized deployments

### AI & Data

- **Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)** — Grounded AI responses
- **Vector databases** — Semantic search and embeddings
- **Knowledge graphs** — Structured relationship modeling
